/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/two_spies_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/two_spies_server.dir/src/network/Session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/two_spies_server.dir/src/network/WebSocketServer.cpp.o -o two_spies_server  libtwo_spies_lib.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.1/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib
